# Home

![Image 12: CANNACARE HEALTH](https://cannacare-health.de/wp-content/uploads/2020/06/cannacare_health_cbd_hersteller_produkte.jpg)

## CANNACARE HEALTH

with diligence made CBD Products.

[learn more](https://cannacare-health.de/#)

##### who we are

CannaCare® Health is one of the leading German manufacturers and wholesalers of high-quality CBD products. Our products are produced in Germany and Europe and meet the highest standards in the market.

##### OUR EXPERTISE

From seed to sale: Every step of our supply chain is subject to strict controlling in order to secure highest possible quality of our products.

## OUR OWN PRODUCT BRAND

#### The high-quality CannaCare® products are distributed under our product brand CANOBO®.

[<<go to our Onlinehop>>](https://canobo.de/)

Discover or high-quality and innovative CBD products. The brand CANOBO® offers a wide range of products categories from CBD oils in different concentrations, to a muscle gel, a slim shake, and bath additives like bath bombs and shower tabs.

[![Image 13](https://cannacare-health.de/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/CBD_Gruppe_Welle-1015x1024.jpg)](https://canobo.de/)

© 2022 CannaCare Health GmbH | Alle Rechte vorbehalten | [Impressum](https://cannacare-health.de/impressum/)|[Datenschutz.](https://cannacare-health.de/datenschutz)

Datenschutz & Cookie Richtlinien

Close

#### Privacy Overview

This website uses cookies to improve your experience while you navigate through the website. Out of these cookies, the cookies that are categorized as necessary are stored on your browser as they are essential for the working of basic functionalities of the website. We also use third-party cookies that help us analyze and understand how you use this website. These cookies will be stored in your browser only with your consent. You also have the option to opt-out of these cookies. But opting out of some of these cookies may have an effect on your browsing experience.
